content.headline: Sustainably Crafted for Life's Quiet Moments

benefits.title: Sustainably Sourced
benefits.description: Every material is ethically harvested and traceable from source to studio, ensuring minimal environmental impact.

benefits.title: Handcrafted with Care
benefits.description: Master artisans pour generations of knowledge into every piece, making each item truly one of a kind.

benefits.title: Timeless Design
benefits.description: Minimalist aesthetics rooted in warmth — pieces that transition seamlessly through seasons and trends.

sections.name: Customer Reviews
sections.layout: carousel / grid of testimonial cards with star ratings

reviews.name: Elena V.
reviews.text: The ceramic teapot I received is absolutely stunning. It feels like holding a piece of history in my hands. The craftsmanship is unmatched.

reviews.name: Marcus T.
reviews.text: I've been a Monthly member for six months and every delivery feels like a gift to myself. The curation is impeccable.

reviews.name: Priya K.
reviews.text: Finally, a brand that truly cares about sustainability without compromising beauty. My home feels warmer already.
